video_title: Guy Fieri Eats "Next-Level" Cuban Sandwich in Louisiana | Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives | Food Network

restaurants.name: Iverstein Butcher
restaurants.guy_intro: So I'm here in southern Louisiana, Baton Rouge to be exact, to check out a butcher shop. Not your average butcher shop, this is Iverstein Butcher, where farmer butcher chef Gail Iverstein is bringing his commitment to the natural meat cycle to the table, and they also have a restaurant.

dishes.description: Smoked ham, pulled pork with mojo sauce, Swiss cheese, pickles, mayo, and mustard, pressed on bread.
dishes.guy_response: Bro, it eats like a dinner. Just really precisely put together. Dude, you're on your game. That's a sandwich I'd drive an hour to go get. The pork with the mojo really just pops. I'm a big fan of the crunch. And honestly, I'm gonna eat the whole thing.

dishes.description: A burger patty served with pork rinds.
dishes.guy_response: This is one of the best burgers I've had.

dishes.dish_name: Hog's Head Grilled Cheese with Ham
dishes.description: Fried head cheese (made from boiled pig's head, shredded meat, reduced collagen, seasoned, battered, and fried in pork fat) served on butter-toasted bread with ham, smoked Gouda, house-made remoulade, and pickled onions.
dishes.guy_response: Well, I've never had head cheese fried like this. It's 20 different flavors at once. I mean, this head cheese is fantastic. It's seasoned perfectly. Silky smooth. It's almost juicy coming out of like a sausage casing. That head cheese just needs to be by itself. Absolutely. Not even fried. I like it when it's in its band, but I'd like to see the solo album. The coating on the meat that's in there is incredible. I've never seen it done like that before. I'm a ham fanatic. This is probably the best ham I've ever had in my life. That's a lot coming from Mignon.

dishes.description: Crispy pork rinds fried in hog lard and seasoned with a house blend.
dishes.guy_response: It's hard to focus right now because I'm having these chicharrones.
